faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Great Kills typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free in-home inspections to provide accurate quotes and can often accommodate same-day service for urgent situations.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Great Kills home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Great Kills homes take 2-4 hours for heat treatment or 1-2 hours for chemical applications. We typically recommend a follow-up inspection within 2-3 weeks to ensure complete elimination. Treatment time varies based on home size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. For chemical applications, we provide clear instructions on when it's safe to return home, typically within 2-4 hours after treatment.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC provides a comprehensive guarantee on all bed bug treatments in Great Kills. If bed bugs return within our warranty period (typically 30-60 days), we'll re-treat your home at no additional charge. We also provide detailed prevention guidance to help keep your home bed bug-free.
